auth.registerSubtitle: Join Rashad Engine to get started
auth.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to continue managing your proposals and projects.
auth.otpDescription: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email address
auth.otpSent: Verification code sent to your email!
auth.otpError: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
auth.otpLocked: Too many attempts. Try again in {time}
auth.otpEmailHint: A verification code was sent to
auth.checkSpamNote: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder.

validation.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 3 characters
validation.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most 100 characters
validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
validation.passwordStrength: Password must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

hero.description: Rashad is Rubix's flagship internal intelligence platform designed to support the consulting lifecycle end-to-end by combining AI agents, structured knowledge, workflow automation, and decision support into a connected system that enables faster opportunity assessment, RFP understanding, knowledge retrieval, proposal generation, delivery acceleration, project mobilization, and continuous institutional learning.

trustedOrganizations.title: Trusted by Leading Organizations
trustedOrganizations.subtitle: Government entities, enterprises, and consulting teams rely on Rubix solutions to deliver structured, high-quality proposals and strategic outcomes.

smartAgents.title: Powered by Smart AI Agents
smartAgents.subtitle1: Each agent handles a specific part of the consulting workflow.
smartAgents.subtitle2: Think of them as expert team members, each with a focused responsibility, working together in a coordinated sequence to produce the final output.
smartAgents.agent1Desc: Analyzes RFPs, extracts key requirements, and structures document data for downstream agents.
smartAgents.agent2Desc: Generates concise summaries and actionable insights from complex consulting documents.
smartAgents.agent3Desc: Retrieves relevant institutional knowledge and past project references to inform proposals.
smartAgents.agent4Desc: Produces structured, high-quality proposals aligned with RFP requirements and templates.
smartAgents.agent5Desc: Streamlines project execution timelines and identifies optimization opportunities.
smartAgents.agent6Desc: Prepares team assignments, resource plans, and project kickoff documentation.

whatRashadCanDo.title: What Rashad Can Do
whatRashadCanDo.subtitle: Rashad simplifies the entire proposal lifecycle — from understanding the RFP to generating proposals and preparing project mobilization.

cta.title: Ready to Generate Your Proposals?
cta.subtitle: Start creating structured, professional proposals faster with Rashad Engine. Analyze RFPs, generate proposals, and prepare your team for project execution — all in one platform.

footer.description: Rashad Engine helps consulting teams analyze RFPs, generate structured proposals, and prepare project plans in minutes — not days.
